race.description: Koobah Performance Horses Romantic Dream 2Yo Plate
race.comment: PUTINACALL (2) drifted back from the wide gate on debut before closing strongly with a tough Maiden victory over 1000m at this track. Gets a better set-up for this and expect to see him a little closer in the run. The one to beat. WHAT A SCANDAL (11) suffered a bump at the start and knuckled down strongly in the straight with an unlucky nose second over 1000m at this track. Tricky map again and expected to figure prominently. LILIYA (6) Russian Revolution filly from High Low Bet on debut for the Kris Lees stable. Given the two trials and capable of taking a hand in the finish. TRICIA'S RAINBOW (10) smart debut win two-back, then was a total forgive from a wide gate with a battling eleventh over 1100m at Wellington in the Boot. Improver.
